calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NOTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petition granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
